briefdescription.para: CSU SHA3 hash length in bits.
CSU SHA3 hash length in words.
Keccak and NIST padding masks.

detaileddescription.para: CSU SHA3 start Keccak padding mask

briefdescription.para: CSU SHA3 end Keccak padding mask.
CSU SHA3 start NIST padding mask.
CSU SHA3 end NIST padding mask.
This inline function waits till SHA3 completes its operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the SHA3 completes its operation. XST_FAILURE if a timeout has occurred.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Sha3 *InstancePtr, const u8 *Data, const u32 Size, u8 IsLast)
memberdef.name: XSecure_Sha3DmaTransfer

briefdescription.para: This function Transfers Data through Dma.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to the input data need to be transferred.
Size of the input data in bytes.
To indicate last transfer.

listitem.para: Configure the SSS for SHA3 hashing.
Checking the CSU DMA done bit should be enough.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Sha3 *InstancePtr, const u8 *Data, const u32 Size, u8 IsLastUpdate)
memberdef.name: XSecure_Sha3DataUpdate

briefdescription.para: This function updates hash for data block of size <= 512MB.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to the input data for hashing.
Size of the input data in bytes.
Indicates if this is the last update.

listitem.para: Handle Partial data and non dword aligned data address
Process data of size in multiple of dwords
Handle remaining data during processing of next data chunk or during data padding

briefdescription.para: This function generates padding for the SHA-3 engine.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to location where padding is to be applied.
Length of padding in bytes.

briefdescription.para: Generate padding for the NIST SHA-3.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
is the pointer to location where padding is to be applied
is the length of padding in bytes

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a XSecure_Sha3 structure with the default values required for operating the SHA3 cryptographic engine.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to the XCsuDma instance.

simplesect.para: The base address is initialized directly with value from xsecure_hw.h The default is NIST SHA3 padding, to change to KECCAK padding call XSecure_Sha3PadSelection() after XSecure_Sha3Initialize().

briefdescription.para: This function provides an option to select the SHA-3 padding type to be used while calculating the hash.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Type of SHA3 padding to be used (XSECURE_CSU_NIST_SHA3 for NIST SHA-3 padding or XSECURE_CSU_KECCAK_SHA3 for KECCAK SHA-3 padding)

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if pad selection is successful. XST_FAILURE if pad selection is failed.
The default provides support for NIST SHA-3. If a user wants to change the padding to Keccak SHA-3, this function should be called after XSecure_Sha3Initialize()

listitem.para: If operation is in between can't be modified

briefdescription.para: This function is to notify this is the last update of data where sha padding is also been included along with the data in the next update call.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if last update can be accepted

briefdescription.para: This function configures Secure Stream Switch and starts the SHA-3 engine.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the SHA3 engine with the input data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to the input data for hashing.
Size of the input data in bytes.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the update is successful XST_FAILURE if there is a failure in SSS config

listitem.para: Set SHA under reset on failure condition

briefdescription.para: This function updates SHA3 engine with final data which includes SHA3 padding and reads final hash on complete data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to location where resulting hash will be written

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if finished without any errors XST_FAILURE if Sha3PadType is other than KECCAK or NIST

listitem.para: If requested, read out the Hash in reverse order.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Sha3 *InstancePtr, const u8 *In, const u32 Size, u8 *Out)
memberdef.name: XSecure_Sha3Digest

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the SHA-3 digest on the given input data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to the input data for hashing
Size of the input data
Pointer to location where resulting hash will be written.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if digest calculation done successfully XST_FAILURE if any error from Sha3Update or Sha3Finish.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the SHA3 hash of the data and it can be called between calls to XSecure_Sha3Update.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
Pointer to a buffer in which read hash will be stored.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the interface functions for SHA driver.

detaileddescription.para: Refer to the header file xsecure_sha.h for more detailed information. MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 ba 08/10/14 Initial release 2.0 vns 01/28/17 Added API to read SHA3 hash. 2.2 vns 07/06/17 Added doxygen tags 3.0 vns 01/23/18 Added NIST SHA3 support. Added SSS configuration before every CSU DMA transfer 3.2 ka 04/30/18 Modified SHa3 hash calculation functionality to support the following features:
To support byte aligned data,
To support non-word aligned address
And also fixed limitation of input data, now size of input can be of any size. not limited to 512MB. 4.0 arc 12/18/18 Fixed MISRA-C violations. arc 03/06/19 Added asserts to validate input params. vns 03/12/19 Modified as part of XilSecure code re-arch. arc 03/20/19 Added time outs and status info for API's. mmd 03/15/19 Refactored the code. psl 03/26/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation vns 03/30/19 Added error condition in XSecure_Sha3Finish for for wrong pad selection 4.1 kal 05/20/19 Updated doxygen tags psl 07/02/19 Fixed Coverity warnings. mmd 07/05/19 Optimized the code psl 07/31/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation 4.2 har 01/06/20 Removed asserts to validate zero size of data as per CR-1049217 since hashing of zero size data is valid mmd 02/03/20 optimized XSecure_Sha3DataUpdate function kpt 02/03/20 Enhanced the Code for non-aligned data and aligned address i.e CR-1052152 har 03/23/20 Moved to zynqmp directory and removed versal related code kpt 04/06/20 Updated Sha3 State variable in Xsecure_Sha3Update vns 04/13/20 Improved SHA3Finish to handle if last update is set kot 04/21/20 Fixed MISRA C violations 4.6 kal 08/11/21 Added EXPORT CONTROL eFuse check in Sha3Initialize am 09/17/21 Resolved compiler warnings 4.7 am 11/26/21 Resolved doxygen warnings 5.2 ng 07/05/23 add SDT support ss 04/05/24 Fixed doxygen warnings
